label: Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling

node.label: Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling
node.definition: Batching and admission control combine requests, assign accelerator time, enforce priorities, and balance latency, throughput, fairness, and memory pressure.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling is to connect Model servers & inference runtimes, Distributed systems & networking to downstream capabilities including Paged attention & KV-memory management, Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization.
examples: substrate for Paged attention & KV-memory management
substrate for Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Model servers & inference runtimes, Distributed systems & networking.

dependencies.rationale: Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling turns Model servers & inference runtimes into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling turns Distributed systems & networking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling turns Algorithms & data structures into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
